content:
本文档对 AMD KFD (Kernel Fusion Driver) 中的 SMI 事件系统及 Event 相关 IOCTL 进行深入分析，涵盖代码结构、架构设计、数据流及调用关系。

代码分析范围：

  • drivers/gpu/drm/amd/amdkfd/kfd_smi_events.c
  • drivers/gpu/drm/amd/amdkfd/kfd_smi_events.h
  • drivers/gpu/drm/amd/amdkfd/kfd_chardev.c 中的 Event IOCTL
  • drivers/gpu/drm/amd/amdkfd/kfd_events.c（Event 实现）

1. 整体架构概览

1.1 双事件系统架构 (Text 视图)

AMD KFD 中存在两套独立的事件机制：

+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                           AMD KFD 事件系统架构                                                     |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                                  |
|  +----------------------------------------+     +-----------------------------------------------+|
|  |  SMI Events (系统管理接口)              |     |  KFD Events (用户同步事件)                      ||
|  |  - 监控/观测用途                       |     |  - 用户态同步/异常通知                          ||
|  |  - 只读流式事件                        |     |  - 可等待、可设置、可复位                        ||
|  +----------------------------------------+     +-----------------------------------------------+|
|           |                                              |                                       |
|           v                                              v                                       |
|  AMDKFD_IOC_SMI_EVENTS                            AMDKFD_IOC_CREATE_EVENT                        |
|  -> kfd_ioctl_smi_events                           -> kfd_ioctl_create_event                    |
|  -> kfd_smi_event_open                             -> kfd_event_create                           |
|  -> anon_inode_getfd (返回 fd)                      AMDKFD_IOC_DESTROY_EVENT                     |
|                                                     AMDKFD_IOC_SET_EVENT                         |
|  用户通过 fd: read/poll/write                       AMDKFD_IOC_RESET_EVENT                       |
|  订阅并接收 SMI 事件                                 AMDKFD_IOC_WAIT_EVENTS                       |
|                                                     -> kfd_wait_on_events                        |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

1.2 模块关系图 (Text 视图)

kfd_chardev.c (IOCTL 入口)
                           |
        +------------------+------------------+
        |                  |                  |
        v                  v                  v
kfd_ioctl_smi_events   kfd_ioctl_create_event   kfd_ioctl_wait_events
        |                  |                  |
        v                  v                  v
kfd_smi_events.c      kfd_events.c           kfd_events.c
        |                  |                  |
        +-- kfd_smi_client +-- kfd_event      +-- kfd_event_waiter
        +-- kfifo          +-- signal_page    +-- wait_queue
        +-- dev->smi_clients+-- p->event_idr  +-- schedule_timeout

2. SMI 事件系统

2.1 SMI 事件类型概览 (kfd_smi_event)

枚举值名称说明触发来源
1VMFAULTVM 故障kfd_int_process_v9/v11.c、cik_event_interrupt.c
2THERMAL_THROTTLE热节流kgd2kfd_smi_event_throttle → kfd_device.c
3GPU_PRE_RESETGPU 复位前kfd_device.c 中 kgd2kfd_suspend 前
4GPU_POST_RESETGPU 复位后kfd_device.c 中 resume 后
5MIGRATE_START迁移开始kfd_migrate.c、kfd_svm.c
6MIGRATE_END迁移结束kfd_migrate.c
7PAGE_FAULT_START缺页开始kfd_svm.c 中 svm_range_migrate_vram_to_ram
8PAGE_FAULT_END缺页结束kfd_svm.c
9QUEUE_EVICTION队列驱逐kfd_process.c 中 evict_process_queues
10QUEUE_RESTORE队列恢复kfd_process.c 中 restore_process_queues
11UNMAP_FROM_GPU从 GPU 解除映射kfd_svm.c 中 svm_range_unmap_from_gpu
12PROCESS_START进程开始kfd_process.c 中 kfd_bind_process_to_device
13PROCESS_END进程结束kfd_process.c 中 kfd_process_device_destroy
64ALL_PROCESS全进程标志需 CAP_SYS_ADMIN，可接收任意进程事件

2.2 SMI 事件类型详解（格式、字段、触发枚举）

每条 SMI 事件消息以 event_id（十六进制 + 空格）开头，随后是格式化的数据。event_id 为 KFD_SMI_EVENT_* 枚举值。KFD_SMI_EVENT_MSG_SIZE = 96 字节。

2.2.1 VMFAULT (1)

项目说明
格式KFD_EVENT_FMT_VMFAULT → "%x:%s\n"
字段pid（进程 ID）、task_name（进程名，comm，最多 15 字符）
触发VM 故障中断，由 amdgpu_vm_get_task_info_pasid 获取任务信息
过滤仅当 task_info->task.pid != 0 时上报（排除内核重试导致的 VM 故障）
调用kfd_smi_event_update_vmfault(dev, pasid)
来源kfd_int_process_v9/v11.c、cik_event_interrupt.c 中 VM 故障 IH 处理
示例1 1234:my_app\n

2.2.2 THERMAL_THROTTLE (2)

项目说明
格式KFD_EVENT_FMT_THERMAL_THROTTLING → "%llx:%llx\n"
字段bitmask（节流位掩码）、counter（节流计数）
触发PMFW 热节流，amdgpu_dpm_get_thermal_throttling_counter
调用kfd_smi_event_update_thermal_throttling(dev, throttle_bitmask)
来源kgd2kfd_smi_event_throttle → kfd_device.c:1479
示例2 1:42\n

2.2.3 GPU_PRE_RESET (3) / GPU_POST_RESET (4)

项目说明
格式KFD_EVENT_FMT_UPDATE_GPU_RESET → "%x %s\n"
字段reset_seq_num（复位序号，仅 PRE 递增）、reset_cause（复位原因字符串）
触发GPU 复位前/后，amdgpu_reset_get_desc 获取原因
调用kfd_smi_event_update_gpu_reset(dev, post_reset, reset_context)
来源kfd_device.c：PRE 在 kgd2kfd_suspend 前，POST 在 resume 后
示例3 5 RAS\n、4 5 \n

2.2.4 MIGRATE_START (5) / MIGRATE_END (6)

项目说明
格式 START"%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x->%x %x:%x %d\n"
字段 STARTns、pid、start（页起始）、size（页数）、from、to、prefetch_loc、preferred_loc、migrate_trigger
格式 END"%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x->%x %d %d\n"
字段 ENDns、pid、start、size、from、to、migrate_trigger、error_code
迁移触发KFD_MIGRATE_TRIGGER_PREFETCH(0)、PAGEFAULT_GPU(1)、PAGEFAULT_CPU(2)、TTM_EVICTION(3)
调用kfd_smi_event_migration_start/end
来源kfd_migrate.c（svm_migrate_vram_to_ram、svm_migrate_to_vram）、kfd_svm.c、kfd_migrate.c:1015（CPU 缺页）
示例5 1234567890 -1234 @0x1000(0x100) 0->1 0:1 1\n

2.2.5 PAGE_FAULT_START (7) / PAGE_FAULT_END (8)

项目说明
格式"%lld -%d @%lx(%x) %c\n"
字段ns（START 用 ktime_to_ns，END 用 ktime_get_boottime_ns）、pid、addr、node（GPU ID）、rw/migrate_update
rwSTART：'W' 写缺页、'R' 读缺页
migrate_updateEND：'M' 迁移恢复、'U' 更新恢复
调用kfd_smi_event_page_fault_start/end
来源kfd_svm.c 中 svm_range_migrate_vram_to_ram 前后
示例7 1234567890 -1234 @0x7f000000(0) R\n、8 1234567890 -1234 @0x7f000000(0) M\n

2.2.6 QUEUE_EVICTION (9) / QUEUE_RESTORE (10)

项目说明
格式 EVICTION"%lld -%d %x %d\n"
字段 EVICTIONns、pid、node、evict_trigger
格式 RESTORE"%lld -%d %x %c\n"
字段 RESTOREns、pid、node、rescheduled（0 或 'R'）
队列驱逐触发KFD_QUEUE_EVICTION_TRIGGER_SVM(0)、USERPTR(1)、TTM(2)、SUSPEND(3)、CRIU_CHECKPOINT(4)、CRIU_RESTORE(5)
调用kfd_smi_event_queue_eviction、kfd_smi_event_queue_restore
来源kfd_process.c（evict_process_queues、restore_process_queues）、kfd_svm.c（kgd2kfd_quiesce_mm）、kfd_chardev.c（CRIU）、amdgpu_amdkfd_gpuvm.c
示例9 1234567890 -1234 0 0\n、10 1234567890 -1234 0 0\n

2.2.7 UNMAP_FROM_GPU (11)

项目说明
格式"%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x %d\n"
字段ns、pid、addr、size（页数）、node、unmap_trigger
解除映射触发KFD_SVM_UNMAP_TRIGGER_MMU_NOTIFY(0)、MMU_NOTIFY_MIGRATE(1)、UNMAP_FROM_CPU(2)
调用kfd_smi_event_unmap_from_gpu
来源kfd_svm.c 中 svm_range_unmap_from_gpu
示例b 1234567890 -1234 @0x7f000000(0x100) 0 0\n

2.2.8 PROCESS_START (12) / PROCESS_END (13)

项目说明
格式KFD_EVENT_FMT_PROCESS → "%x %s\n"
字段pid、task_name（comm）
调用kfd_smi_event_process(pdd, start)
来源kfd_process.c：START 在 kfd_bind_process_to_device，END 在 kfd_process_device_destroy
示例c 1234 my_app\n、d 1234 my_app\n

2.2.9 订阅掩码与 ALL_PROCESS 标志

项目说明
掩码KFD_SMI_EVENT_MASK_FROM_INDEX(i) = 1ULL << (i-1)
多事件write(fd, &mask, 8)，mask 为多个事件掩码的按位或
ALL_PROCESSKFD_SMI_EVENT_MASK_FROM_INDEX(64) 需 CAP_SYS_ADMIN，否则仅接收本进程 SVM 相关事件
pid 过滤非 root：client->pid != pid 时丢弃；root：可接收任意进程事件

事件 ID 十六进制对照：1→1, 2→2, …, 9→9, 10→a, 11→b, 12→c, 13→d。用户态解析时用 %x 读取 event_id。

2.2.10 触发枚举汇总

枚举值说明
KFD_MIGRATE_TRIGGER_PREFETCH0预取到 GPU VRAM 或系统内存
KFD_MIGRATE_TRIGGER_PAGEFAULT_GPU1GPU 缺页恢复
KFD_MIGRATE_TRIGGER_PAGEFAULT_CPU2CPU 缺页恢复
KFD_MIGRATE_TRIGGER_TTM_EVICTION3TTM 驱逐
KFD_QUEUE_EVICTION_TRIGGER_SVM0SVM 缓冲区迁移
KFD_QUEUE_EVICTION_TRIGGER_USERPTR1userptr 移动
KFD_QUEUE_EVICTION_TRIGGER_TTM2TTM 移动缓冲区
KFD_QUEUE_EVICTION_TRIGGER_SUSPEND3GPU 挂起
KFD_QUEUE_EVICTION_CRIU_CHECKPOINT4CRIU checkpoint
KFD_QUEUE_EVICTION_CRIU_RESTORE5CRIU restore
KFD_SVM_UNMAP_TRIGGER_MMU_NOTIFY0MMU notifier CPU 缓冲区移动
KFD_SVM_UNMAP_TRIGGER_MMU_NOTIFY_MIGRATE1MMU notifier 页迁移
KFD_SVM_UNMAP_TRIGGER_UNMAP_FROM_CPU2解除映射以释放缓冲区

2.2.11 各事件调用点与触发枚举详细映射

事件调用函数文件:行/上下文触发枚举及来源
VMFAULTkfd_smi_event_update_vmfaultkfd_int_process_v9.c:572, kfd_int_process_v11.c:348, cik_event_interrupt.c:113无触发枚举，VM 故障 IH 直接调用
THERMAL_THROTTLEkfd_smi_event_update_thermal_throttlingkfd_device.c:1487 (kgd2kfd_smi_event_throttle)无，PMFW 热节流
GPU_PRE/POST_RESETkfd_smi_event_update_gpu_resetkfd_device.c:994(PRE), 1033(POST)reset_cause 来自 amdgpu_reset_get_desc
MIGRATE_START/ENDkfd_smi_event_migration_start/endkfd_migrate.c:433,471(vram→ram), 744,783(ram→vram); kfd_migrate.c:1015(CPU 缺页)PREFETCH(0), PAGEFAULT_GPU(1), PAGEFAULT_CPU(2), TTM_EVICTION(3)
PAGE_FAULT_START/ENDkfd_smi_event_page_fault_start/endkfd_svm.c:3143,3186 (svm_range_migrate_vram_to_ram)rw: W/R; migrate_update: M/U
QUEUE_EVICTIONkfd_smi_event_queue_evictionkfd_process.c:2046; kfd_svm.c:1995(SVM); amdgpu_amdkfd_gpuvm.c:2876(userptr); kfd_process.c:2263(TTM); kfd_device.c:2360(SUSPEND); kfd_chardev.c(CRIU)SVM(0), USERPTR(1), TTM(2), SUSPEND(3), CRIU_CHECKPOINT(4), CRIU_RESTORE(5)
QUEUE_RESTOREkfd_smi_event_queue_restorekfd_process.c:2078,2101; kfd_svm.c:1927 (queue_restore_rescheduled, resched=‘R’)rescheduled: 0=正常, ‘R’=恢复失败需重试
UNMAP_FROM_GPUkfd_smi_event_unmap_from_gpukfd_svm.c:1363(迁移), 1734(UNMAP_FROM_CPU), 1995⁄2488(MMU_NOTIFY)MMU_NOTIFY(0), MMU_NOTIFY_MIGRATE(1), UNMAP_FROM_CPU(2)
PROCESS_START/ENDkfd_smi_event_processkfd_process.c:1798(bind), 1057(destroy)无，进程绑定/销毁

2.2.12 SMI 事件处理类型分类（按 pid 与过滤逻辑）

内核在 kfd_smi_event_add 时传入的 pid 决定事件是否受进程过滤约束：

分类事件传入 pid过滤逻辑
全局事件VMFAULT, THERMAL_THROTTLE, GPU_PRE_RESET, GPU_POST_RESET, PROCESS_START, PROCESS_END0kfd_smi_ev_enabled 中 pid && client->pid != pid 为假，仅检查 events 掩码
进程相关事件PAGE_FAULT, MIGRATE, QUEUE_EVICTION, QUEUE_RESTORE, UNMAP_FROM_GPU实际 pid非 root 且 client->pid != pid 时丢弃；需 ALL_PROCESS 或本进程才能接收
  • VMFAULT / PROCESS：通过 amdgpu_vm_get_task_info 获取 pid，但 kfd_smi_event_add 传 pid=0，故对所有订阅者可见（需掩码匹配）。
  • 进程相关事件：必须 client->pid == pid 或 client->suser 才投递。

2.2.13 各事件类型完整解析表（sscanf 格式与 C 类型）

event_id事件名payload sscanf 格式解析变量类型字段含义
1VMFAULT"%x:%15s"uint32_t pid; char name[16]pid（十六进制）、进程名(comm)
2THERMAL_THROTTLE"%llx:%llx"uint64_t bitmask, counter节流位掩码、计数
3⁄4GPU_PRE/POST_RESET"%u %63s"uint32_t seq; char cause[64]复位序号、原因字符串
5MIGRATE_START"%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x->%x %x:%x %d"int64_t ns; int pid; unsigned long start, size; uint32_t from, to, prefetch_loc, preferred_loc; int trigger时间戳、pid、起始页、页数、from/to GPU、预取/首选位置、迁移触发
6MIGRATE_END"%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x->%x %d %d"int64_t ns; int pid; unsigned long start, size; uint32_t from, to; int trigger, error_code同上 + error_code（0=成功，负值=errno）
7PAGE_FAULT_START"%lld -%d @%lx(%x) %c"int64_t ns; int pid; unsigned long addr; uint32_t node; char rwrw=‘W’ 写缺页，’R’ 读缺页
8PAGE_FAULT_END"%lld -%d @%lx(%x) %c"int64_t ns; int pid; unsigned long addr; uint32_t node; char mumu=’M’ 迁移恢复，’U’ 更新恢复
9QUEUE_EVICTION"%lld -%d %x %d"int64_t ns; int pid; uint32_t node; int trigger驱逐触发枚举
10QUEUE_RESTORE"%lld -%d %x %c"int64_t ns; int pid; uint32_t node; char reschedresched=‘R’ 表示恢复失败需重试
11UNMAP_FROM_GPU"%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x %d"int64_t ns; int pid; unsigned long addr, size; uint32_t node; int trigger地址、页数、解除映射触发
12⁄13PROCESS_START/END"%x %15s"uint32_t pid; char name[16]pid（十六进制）、进程名

注意：

  • pid 在格式中为 -%d，内核传入正数，输出为 -1234，解析后取绝对值。
  • start/size/addr 单位为页（PAGE_SIZE）。
  • error_code（MIGRATE_END）：0 表示成功，负值表示 errno（如 -ENOMEM、-EFAULT、-ENODEV 等）。
  • rescheduled（QUEUE_RESTORE）：'R' 表示恢复失败，已重新调度稍后重试；0 或非 'R' 表示正常恢复完成。

2.2.14 用户态解析示例（完整版）

/* 读取一条事件，格式: "event_id field1 field2 ...\n"
 * event_id 为十六进制，与 KFD_SMI_EVENT_* 枚举对应
 */
char buf[KFD_SMI_EVENT_MSG_SIZE];
ssize_t n = read(smi_fd, buf, sizeof(buf));
unsigned int event_id;
char *payload = strchr(buf, ' ');
if (payload && sscanf(buf, "%x", &event_id) >= 1) {
    payload++;
    switch (event_id) {
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_VMFAULT: {
        uint32_t pid; char name[16];
        sscanf(payload, "%x:%15s", &pid, name);  /* pid 为十六进制 */
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_PAGE_FAULT_START: {
        long long ns; int pid; unsigned long addr; unsigned node; char rw;
        sscanf(payload, "%lld -%d @%lx(%x) %c", &ns, &pid, &addr, &node, &rw);
        /* rw: 'W'=写缺页, 'R'=读缺页 */
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_PAGE_FAULT_END: {
        long long ns; int pid; unsigned long addr; unsigned node; char mu;
        sscanf(payload, "%lld -%d @%lx(%x) %c", &ns, &pid, &addr, &node, &mu);
        /* mu: 'M'=迁移恢复, 'U'=更新恢复 */
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_MIGRATE_START: {
        long long ns; int pid; unsigned long start, size;
        unsigned from, to, prefetch_loc, preferred_loc; int trigger;
        sscanf(payload, "%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x->%x %x:%x %d",
               &ns, &pid, &start, &size, &from, &to,
               &prefetch_loc, &preferred_loc, &trigger);
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_MIGRATE_END: {
        long long ns; int pid; unsigned long start, size;
        unsigned from, to; int trigger, error_code;
        sscanf(payload, "%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x->%x %d %d",
               &ns, &pid, &start, &size, &from, &to, &trigger, &error_code);
        /* error_code: 0=成功, 负值=errno (如 -ENOMEM) */
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_QUEUE_EVICTION: {
        long long ns; int pid; unsigned node; int trigger;
        sscanf(payload, "%lld -%d %x %d", &ns, &pid, &node, &trigger);
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_QUEUE_RESTORE: {
        long long ns; int pid; unsigned node; char resched;
        sscanf(payload, "%lld -%d %x %c", &ns, &pid, &node, &resched);
        /* resched=='R': 恢复失败，已重新调度重试 */
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_UNMAP_FROM_GPU: {
        long long ns; int pid; unsigned long addr, size; unsigned node; int trigger;
        sscanf(payload, "%lld -%d @%lx(%lx) %x %d",
               &ns, &pid, &addr, &size, &node, &trigger);
        break;
    }
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_PROCESS_START:
    case KFD_SMI_EVENT_PROCESS_END: {
        uint32_t pid; char name[16];
        sscanf(payload, "%x %15s", &pid, name);  /* pid 为十六进制 */
        break;
    }
    /* THERMAL_THROTTLE, GPU_PRE/POST_RESET 等类似 */
    }
}

2.3 SMI 客户端与数据流 (Text 视图)

+------------------+     +------------------+     +------------------+
|  kfd_node        |     |  kfd_smi_client  |     |  User Space      |
|  (per-GPU)       |     |  (per-fd)        |     |                  |
+------------------+     +------------------+     +------------------+
| smi_clients      |---->| list             |     |                  |
| smi_lock         |     | fifo (8KB)       |<----| read()           |
| reset_seq_num    |     | wait_queue       |     | poll()           |
+------------------+     | events (mask)    |<----| write(mask)      |
        ^                 | dev, pid, suser  |     |                  |
        |                 | lock             |     +------------------+
        |                 +------------------+              |
        |                          ^                        |
        |                          | add_event_to_kfifo     |
        |                          |                        |
        +--------------------------+------------------------+
                    kfd_smi_event_add (各事件入口)

2.4 SMI 事件写入流程 (Text 视图)

[事件发生] 例如: kfd_smi_event_page_fault_start
        |
        v
kfd_smi_event_add(pid, node, KFD_SMI_EVENT_PAGE_FAULT_START, fmt, ...)
        |
        +-- if list_empty(&dev->smi_clients) return;
        +-- snprintf(fifo_in, "%x ", event) + vsnprintf(fmt, ...)
        |
        v
add_event_to_kfifo(pid, dev, smi_event, event_msg, len)
        |
        +-- rcu_read_lock()
        +-- list_for_each_entry_rcu(client, &dev->smi_clients, list)
        |       +-- if !kfd_smi_ev_enabled(pid, client, smi_event) continue;
        |       +-- spin_lock(&client->lock)
        |       +-- if kfifo_avail >= len: kfifo_in(), wake_up_all()
        |       +-- else: pr_debug("no space left")
        |       +-- spin_unlock(&client->lock)
        +-- rcu_read_unlock()

2.5 SMI 事件过滤逻辑 (kfd_smi_ev_enabled)

// kfd_smi_events.c:164-172
static bool kfd_smi_ev_enabled(pid_t pid, struct kfd_smi_client *client,
                               unsigned int event)
{
    uint64_t events = READ_ONCE(client->events);
    // 非 root 且 pid 不匹配：仅接收本进程事件
    if (pid && client->pid != pid && !client->suser)
        return false;
    // 检查事件位掩码
    return events & KFD_SMI_EVENT_MASK_FROM_INDEX(event);
}
  • suser (CAP_SYS_ADMIN)：可接收任意进程事件（配合 KFD_SMI_EVENT_ALL_PROCESS）
  • events：用户通过 write() 设置的位掩码，KFD_SMI_EVENT_MASK_FROM_INDEX(i) = 1ULL << (i-1)

2.5.1 SMI 事件处理流程（内核侧）

kfd_smi_event_add(pid, dev, event, fmt, ...)
    |
    +-- if list_empty(&dev->smi_clients) return;  // 无订阅者则直接返回
    +-- snprintf(fifo_in, "%x ", event) + vsnprintf(fmt, ...)  // 格式化消息
    |
    v
add_event_to_kfifo(pid, dev, smi_event, event_msg, len)
    |
    +-- rcu_read_lock()
    +-- list_for_each_entry_rcu(client, &dev->smi_clients, list)
    |       |
    |       +-- if !kfd_smi_ev_enabled(pid, client, smi_event) continue;  // 过滤
    |       +-- spin_lock(&client->lock)
    |       +-- if kfifo_avail(&client->fifo) >= len
    |       |       kfifo_in(&client->fifo, event_msg, len)
    |       |       wake_up_all(&client->wait_queue)
    |       +-- else
    |       |       pr_debug("no space left")  // 丢弃，不阻塞
    |       +-- spin_unlock(&client->lock)
    +-- rcu_read_lock()

处理类型总结：

  • 无订阅者：直接返回，不分配内存。
  • 有订阅者：遍历所有 client，对每个 client 检查 kfd_smi_ev_enabled；通过则尝试写入 kfifo。
  • fifo 满：事件被丢弃，仅 pr_debug，不阻塞调用者。
  • 多 client：同一事件可投递到多个 client（每个 client 独立 kfifo）。

2.6 SMI 文件操作 (kfd_smi_ev_fops)

操作实现说明
pollkfd_smi_ev_poll检查 fifo 非空，返回 EPOLLIN
readkfd_smi_ev_read从 kfifo 读出数据，copy_to_user，最大 8KB
writekfd_smi_ev_write写入 8 字节 events 掩码，WRITE_ONCE(client->events, events)
releasekfd_smi_ev_release从 smi_clients 移除，call_rcu 释放 client

read 语义：read 返回的是 kfifo 中的原始字节流，可能包含多条事件（每条以 \n 结尾）。用户态应按行分割（如 strtok 或逐行解析），每条行格式为 event_id payload\n。单条事件最大 96 字节。

2.7 SMI 打开流程 (kfd_smi_event_open)

kfd_ioctl_smi_events (kfd_chardev.c:1772)
        |
        +-- mutex_lock(&p->mutex)
        +-- pdd = kfd_process_device_data_by_id(p, args->gpuid)
        +-- kfd_smi_event_open(pdd->dev, &args->anon_fd)
        |
        v
kfd_smi_event_open (kfd_smi_events.c:368)
        |
        +-- client = kzalloc(sizeof(kfd_smi_client))
        +-- kfifo_alloc(&client->fifo, KFD_MAX_KFIFO_SIZE=8192)
        +-- init_waitqueue_head(&client->wait_queue)
        +-- client->pid = current->tgid
        +-- client->suser = capable(CAP_SYS_ADMIN)
        +-- list_add_rcu(&client->list, &dev->smi_clients)
        +-- anon_inode_getfd("kfd_smi_ev", &kfd_smi_ev_fops, client, O_RDWR)
        +-- *fd = ret (返回的 fd)

3. KFD Event IOCTL 系统

3.1 IOCTL 与参数结构

IOCTL参数结构说明
AMDKFD_IOC_CREATE_EVENTkfd_ioctl_create_event_args创建事件
AMDKFD_IOC_DESTROY_EVENTkfd_ioctl_destroy_event_args销毁事件
AMDKFD_IOC_SET_EVENTkfd_ioctl_set_event_args设置事件（置位）
AMDKFD_IOC_RESET_EVENTkfd_ioctl_reset_event_args复位事件（清零）
AMDKFD_IOC_WAIT_EVENTSkfd_ioctl_wait_events_args等待事件

3.2 kfd_ioctl_create_event 详细流程

kfd_ioctl_create_event (kfd_chardev.c:831)
        |
        +-- args->event_page_offset 非零？
        |       +-- kfd_kmap_event_page(p, args->event_page_offset)
        |       |       (dGPU 用户态分配 event page，首次传入 handle)
        |
        v
kfd_event_create(filp, p, event_type, auto_reset, node_id,
                 &event_id, &event_trigger_data, &event_page_offset, &event_slot_index)
        |
        +-- ev = kzalloc(sizeof(kfd_event))
        +-- ev->type = event_type, ev->auto_reset = auto_reset
        +-- init_waitqueue_head(&ev->wq)
        |
        +-- mutex_lock(&p->event_mutex)
        +-- switch (event_type):
        |       KFD_EVENT_TYPE_SIGNAL / KFD_EVENT_TYPE_DEBUG:
        |           create_signal_event() -> allocate_event_notification_slot()
        |           *event_page_offset = KFD_MMAP_TYPE_EVENTS
        |           *event_slot_index = ev->event_id
        |       default (MEMORY, HW_EXCEPTION):
        |           create_other_event() -> idr_alloc(KFD_FIRST_NONSIGNAL_EVENT_ID, ...)
        +-- *event_id = ev->event_id
        +-- *event_trigger_data = ev->event_id (用于 GPU 发信号)
        +-- mutex_unlock(&p->event_mutex)

Event 类型 (KFD_EVENTTYPE*):

类型值说明
SIGNAL0用户/GPU 可发信号，有 signal slot
HW_EXCEPTION3硬件异常，内核填充 hw_exception_data
DEBUG5调试用，类似 SIGNAL
MEMORY8内存异常，内核填充 memory_exception_data

3.3 kfd_ioctl_destroy_event 详细流程

kfd_ioctl_destroy_event (kfd_chardev.c:859)
        |
        v
kfd_event_destroy(p, args->event_id)
        |
        +-- mutex_lock(&p->event_mutex)
        +-- ev = lookup_event_by_id(p, event_id)  // idr_find
        +-- if ev: destroy_event(p, ev)
        |       +-- spin_lock(&ev->lock)
        |       +-- 遍历 wq，WRITE_ONCE(waiter->event, NULL)
        |       +-- wake_up_all(&ev->wq)
        |       +-- idr_remove(&p->event_idr, ev->event_id)
        |       +-- kfree_rcu(ev, rcu)
        +-- mutex_unlock(&p->event_mutex)

3.4 kfd_ioctl_set_event 详细流程

kfd_ioctl_set_event (kfd_chardev.c:867)
        |
        v
kfd_set_event(p, args->event_id)
        |
        +-- rcu_read_lock()
        +-- ev = lookup_event_by_id(p, event_id)
        +-- if !ev: return -EINVAL
        +-- spin_lock(&ev->lock)
        +-- if event_can_be_cpu_signaled(ev)  // 仅 SIGNAL 类型
        |       set_event(ev)
        |       +-- ev->signaled = !auto_reset || !waitqueue_active(&ev->wq)
        |       +-- ev->event_age++ (防回绕)
        |       +-- 遍历 waiter，WRITE_ONCE(waiter->activated, true)
        |       +-- wake_up_all(&ev->wq)
        +-- spin_unlock(&ev->lock)
        +-- rcu_read_unlock()

3.5 kfd_ioctl_reset_event 详细流程

kfd_ioctl_reset_event (kfd_chardev.c:875)
        |
        v
kfd_reset_event(p, args->event_id)
        |
        +-- rcu_read_lock()
        +-- ev = lookup_event_by_id(p, event_id)
        +-- if event_can_be_cpu_signaled(ev)
        |       reset_event(ev)  // ev->signaled = false
        +-- rcu_read_unlock()

3.6 kfd_ioctl_wait_events 详细流程

kfd_ioctl_wait_events (kfd_chardev.c:883)
        |
        v
kfd_wait_on_events(p, num_events, events_ptr, wait_for_all, &timeout, &wait_result)
        |
        +-- timeout = user_timeout_to_jiffies(*user_timeout_ms)
        |       KFD_EVENT_TIMEOUT_IMMEDIATE(0) -> 0
        |       KFD_EVENT_TIMEOUT_INFINITE(0xFFFFFFFF) -> MAX_SCHEDULE_TIMEOUT
        |
        +-- event_waiters = alloc_event_waiters(num_events)
        +-- mutex_lock(&p->event_mutex)
        +-- for i in num_events:
        |       copy_from_user(&event_data, &events[i])
        |       init_event_waiter(p, &event_waiters[i], &event_data)
        |           +-- ev = lookup_event_by_id(p, event_data->event_id)
        |           +-- waiter->event = ev, waiter->activated = ev->signaled
        |           +-- add_wait_queue(&ev->wq, &waiter->wait)
        |
        +-- *wait_result = test_event_condition(all, num_events, event_waiters)
        |       COMPLETE / TIMEOUT / FAIL
        +-- if COMPLETE: copy_signaled_event_data(), goto out_unlock
        |
        +-- mutex_unlock(&p->event_mutex)
        +-- while (true):
        |       if fatal_signal_pending: ret=-EINTR; break
        |       if signal_pending: ret=-ERESTARTSYS; break
        |       set_current_state(TASK_INTERRUPTIBLE)
        |       *wait_result = test_event_condition(...)
        |       if != TIMEOUT: break
        |       timeout = schedule_timeout(timeout)
        +-- mutex_lock, copy_signaled_event_data (若 COMPLETE)
        +-- free_waiters()
        +-- *wait_result 写回用户

3.7 Signal Event 与 Signal Page (Text 视图)

+------------------+     +------------------+     +------------------+
|  kfd_process    |     |  kfd_signal_page |     |  User Space      |
|  event_idr      |     |                  |     |  (mmap)          |
+------------------+     +------------------+     +------------------+
| signal_page     |---->| kernel_address   |     | user_address     |
| signal_mapped_  |     | [0..limit-1]     |     | (用户 mmap 后)   |
|   size          |     | = 64-bit slots   |     |                  |
+------------------+     +------------------+     +------------------+
        |                         ^                         |
        |                         | GPU 写 1 到 slot         |
        v                         |                         |
  event_id = slot index           +-------------------------+
  user_signal_address = &user_address[event_id]
  • GPU 发信号：CP 写 1 到对应 slot，触发中断 → kfd_signal_event_interrupt → set_event_from_interrupt → acknowledge_signal（清零 slot）+ set_event
  • dGPU event page：用户态分配 BO，首次 CREATE_EVENT 时通过 event_page_offset 传入，kfd_kmap_event_page 映射到内核

4. 数据流与调用关系

4.1 SMI 事件触发源汇总 (Text 视图)

kfd_node (per GPU)
                          |
    +---------------------+---------------------+
    |                     |                     |
    v                     v                     v
kfd_device.c        kfd_migrate.c         kfd_svm.c
kfd_process.c       kfd_int_process_*     kfd_process.c
cik_event_*.c
    |                     |                     |
    +-- GPU reset         +-- migration         +-- page fault
    +-- thermal           +-- migrate_start/end +-- unmap_from_gpu
    +-- vm fault          |                     |
    |                     v                     v
    |              kfd_smi_event_add(pid, node, event, fmt, ...)
    |                     |
    +---------------------+---------------------+
                          |
                          v
                 add_event_to_kfifo(pid, dev, event, msg, len)
                          |
                          v
                 list_for_each_entry_rcu(client, &dev->smi_clients)
                          |
                          v
                 kfifo_in(&client->fifo, msg, len)
                 wake_up_all(&client->wait_queue)

4.2 KFD Event 信号路径 (Text 视图)

[CPU 发信号]                    [GPU 发信号]
kfd_ioctl_set_event             CP 写 signal slot
        |                               |
        v                               v
kfd_set_event                   IH 中断
        |                               |
        v                               v
set_event(ev)                   kfd_signal_event_interrupt(pasid, partial_id, bits)
        |                               |
        +-- ev->signaled = true         +-- lookup_signaled_event_by_partial_id
        +-- wake_up_all(&ev->wq)        +-- set_event_from_interrupt
                                                +-- acknowledge_signal (清零 slot)
                                                +-- set_event(ev)

4.3 完整 IOCTL 分发链 (Text 视图)

用户 ioctl(fd, AMDKFD_IOC_*, &args)
        |
        v
kfd_ioctl(filp, cmd, arg)  // kfd_chardev.c
        |
        +-- cmd 解码
        +-- kfd_process = filep->private_data
        |
        v
ioctl_handlers[cmd](filp, kfd_process, data)
        |
        +-- CREATE_EVENT  -> kfd_ioctl_create_event
        +-- DESTROY_EVENT -> kfd_ioctl_destroy_event
        +-- SET_EVENT     -> kfd_ioctl_set_event
        +-- RESET_EVENT   -> kfd_ioctl_reset_event
        +-- WAIT_EVENTS   -> kfd_ioctl_wait_events
        +-- SMI_EVENTS    -> kfd_ioctl_smi_events

5. 关键数据结构

5.1 kfd_smi_client (kfd_smi_events.c)

struct kfd_smi_client {
    struct list_head list;       // 链入 dev->smi_clients
    struct kfifo fifo;            // 8KB 环形缓冲
    wait_queue_head_t wait_queue;
    uint64_t events;              // 订阅事件位掩码
    struct kfd_node *dev;
    spinlock_t lock;
    struct rcu_head rcu;
    pid_t pid;                    // 创建者 tgid
    bool suser;                   // CAP_SYS_ADMIN
};

5.2 kfd_event (kfd_events.h)

struct kfd_event {
    u32 event_id;
    u64 event_age;
    bool signaled;
    bool auto_reset;
    int type;                     // SIGNAL/HW_EXCEPTION/DEBUG/MEMORY
    spinlock_t lock;
    wait_queue_head_t wq;
    uint64_t __user *user_signal_address;  // 仅 signal 事件
    union {
        struct kfd_hsa_memory_exception_data memory_exception_data;
        struct kfd_hsa_hw_exception_data hw_exception_data;
    };
    struct rcu_head rcu;
};

5.3 kfd_ioctl_create_event_args (UAPI)

struct kfd_ioctl_create_event_args {
    __u64 event_page_offset;   // 入: dGPU 用户 BO handle; 出: mmap 类型
    __u32 event_trigger_data;  // 出: 用于 GPU 发信号的 ID
    __u32 event_type;          // 入: KFD_EVENT_TYPE_*
    __u32 auto_reset;          // 入: 1=自动复位
    __u32 node_id;             // 入: GPU 节点 (部分类型)
    __u32 event_id;            // 出: 事件 ID
    __u32 event_slot_index;    // 出: signal slot 索引
};

5.4 kfd_ioctl_wait_events_args (UAPI)

struct kfd_ioctl_wait_events_args {
    __u64 events_ptr;    // 入: kfd_event_data 数组指针
    __u32 num_events;
    __u32 wait_for_all;  // 1=全部满足, 0=任一满足
    __u32 timeout;       // ms, 0=立即, 0xFFFFFFFF=无限
    __u32 wait_result;   // 出: COMPLETE/TIMEOUT/FAIL
};

5.5 wait_result 取值

值含义
KFD_IOC_WAIT_RESULT_COMPLETE条件满足
KFD_IOC_WAIT_RESULT_TIMEOUT超时
KFD_IOC_WAIT_RESULT_FAIL事件已销毁或错误

附录：关键文件与函数索引

文件函数/符号作用

kfd_smi_events.ckfd_smi_event_add格式化并投递 SMI 事件
kfd_smi_events.cadd_event_to_kfifo向订阅客户端 fifo 写入
kfd_smi_events.ckfd_smi_ev_read/write/poll文件操作

kfd_chardev.ckfd_ioctl_create_event创建事件
kfd_chardev.ckfd_ioctl_destroy_event销毁事件

kfd_chardev.ckfd_ioctl_reset_event复位事件
